LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT FILED ON APRIL 17, 2014. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-03-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS

LAW AND MOTION, 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT ("FACC") SUFFICIENTLY PLEADS FACTS TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER CIV. CODE SECTION 1788.15. (FACC, PARS. 3, 5.) THE COURT DID NOT CONSIDER THE FACTS STATED IN CROSS-DEFENDANT'S MEMORANDUM THAT ARE NOT PLED IN THE FACC, AS A DEMURRER CAN ONLY BE USED TO CHALLENGE DEFECTS THAT APPEAR ON THE FACE OF THE PLEADING OR FACTS THAT ARE JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE. (SEE BLANK V. KIRWIN (1985) 39 CAL.3D 311, 318.) ANSWER TO BE FILED 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976 (302)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-17-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-09-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-17-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sherrett O. Walker, Law Offices of Sherrett O. Walker, Tel. 415.305.6546, for plaintiff and moving party;
Suren N. Weerasuriya, of Law Offices of Todd M. Friedman, PC, Tel. 888.595.9111, for defendant and opposing party;
No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions. Request For Order Establishing Admissions is denied. Request For Sanctions is denied. Opposing party shall prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Set For Trial On Nov-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TIMOTHY S. BROWN OF THE MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, TEL. NO. (858) 414-0180 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. NICHOLAS BONTRAGER, TEL. NO. (877) 206-4741 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is Overruled. The First Amended Cross-Complaint ("FACC") sufficiently pleads facts to state a cause of action under Civ. Code section 1788.15. (FACC, pars. 3, 5.) The Court did not consider the facts stated in Cross-Defendant's memorandum that are not pled in the FACC, as a demurrer can only be used to challenge defects that appear on the face of the pleading or facts that are judicially noticeable. (See Blank v. Kirwin (1985) 39 Cal.3d 311, 318.). ANSWER TO BE FILED 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Continued To Jun-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to June 18, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Midland Funding LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6. Midland Funding LLC must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and the operative pleading to Dept. 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 3, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the demurrer will be overruled. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is off calendar per request of moving party. First Amended Cross-Complaint filed on April 17, 2014. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
